category_sources: source_facts.description: Port of pdftk in java.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitLab repository; README is the best official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://gitlab.com/pdftk-java/pdftk; repository lookup skipped per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a Java port of PDFtk; source_facts.package-manager entries and executable identify the pdftk CLI.
